channel.title: Wedding Photography on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant
channel.description: Recent content in Wedding Photography on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant

item.title: Vitaliy Photography: A Wix-to-WordPress migration proposal for a Cleveland wedding photographer — and what it verified
item.description: A full competitive audit, phased WordPress migration plan, and $4,000 proposal delivered for a Cleveland wedding photographer whose Wix site was insufficient for meaningful SEO results. The engagement independently documented the $1,000/month TWAG retainer rate — stated directly to the prospective client as a pricing reference on June 14, 2022.
